reviews.comment:
Los servicios de la estación van en franca decadencia tres de las cuatro últimas que pasamos en un mes no tenían combustible
Aclaro que soy socio del acá. Los baños estaban sucios .
Pasamos muy seguido pero últimamente lo vemos muy descuidado

(Translated by Google)
The station's services are clearly declining; three of the last four times we've been there in the past month, they were out of fuel.
I should clarify that I'm a member here. The restrooms were filthy. We stop by very often, but lately it's been looking very neglected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOGZQQ3FBRRAB
